apartment.title: Apartment Booking App
apartment.summary: A comprehensive full-stack platform for seamless apartment discovery and secure booking.
apartment.desc:
An enterprise-grade real estate ecosystem designed to redefine the property rental experience. This platform integrates a high-performance Flutter mobile client with a robust FastAPI backend to handle complex booking lifecycles and secure data management.

**🔍 Intelligent Discovery:**
• **Smart Search:** Implements advanced geolocation-based filtering (price, rating, room count) with a 500ms debounced API interface.
• **AI Recommendations:** A behavior-aware engine that classifies users (traveler, family, business) to provide personalized property suggestions.
• **Interactive Mapping:** Full Google Maps integration with custom Haversine algorithms for distance-based sorting.

**🛡️ Security Protocol:**
• **Multi-Layer Encryption:** Combines AES-256-GCM field-level encryption with SQLCipher Transparent Data Encryption (TDE).
• **Robust Auth:** JWT-based sessions with 30-day persistence and Bcrypt cost-factor 12 password hashing.

**⚙️ Technical Excellence:**
• **Optimized Storage:** Utilizes Write-Ahead Logging (WAL) and 32MB page caching for zero-latency database operations.
• **Network Efficiency:** Smart GZip compression (>500 bytes) and parallel data loading for instantaneous page renders.
apartment.full_desc:
The Apartment Booking Platform is a sophisticated full-stack application designed to revolutionize the property rental experience. This enterprise-grade system combines a Flutter-based mobile application with a robust FastAPI backend, delivering a seamless booking experience for users while providing powerful management tools for administrators. The platform represents a complete solution for apartment discovery, booking, payment processing, and property management - all secured with military-grade encryption and enhanced by intelligent recommendation systems.

Core Features:
1. Intelligent Property Discovery: Smart search with advanced filtering and location-based suggestions.
2. Comprehensive Booking System: Complete booking flow with date selection, guest management, and PDF invoice generation.
3. High Security: AES-256-GCM field-level encryption and SQLCipher Transparent Data Encryption (TDE).
4. Property Management: High-quality image galleries, 360° virtual tours, and Google Maps integration.
5. Admin Dashboard: Complete operations control (CRUD), user management, and booking verification.
6. Multilingual Support: Full Arabic and English localization with RTL support.

Technical Highlights:
- FastAPI, SQLAlchemy, and SQLCipher for the backend.
- Flutter, Provider, and Google Maps for the mobile client.
- Multi-layered security architecture with PBKDF2HMAC key derivation.
- Optimized database performance with WAL mode and memory-mapped I/O.

admin.title: Admin Dashboard App
admin.summary: A powerful dashboard for property oversight, user management, and financial transaction verification.
admin.desc:
The central nerve center for the apartment ecosystem, providing administrators with surgical precision over platform operations and user safety.

**🏢 Operational Mastery:**
• **Fleet Management:** Complete CRUD interface for properties with automated verification and audit trails.
• **User Sovereignty:** Real-time account management, role assignment (Admin/User), and activation controls.

**💰 Financial Intelligence:**
• **Booking Oversight:** Visual workflow for verifying receipts, approving bookings, and tracking automated PDF invoices.
• **Security Canaries:** Integrated integrity tracking for encrypted fields and database health monitoring.

**📊 System Transparency:**
• **Live Monitoring:** Real-time dashboards displaying server status, LLM performance, and database latency.
• **Activity Logging:** Comprehensive IP-aware logs documenting every critical system change for maximum accountability.
admin.full_desc:
The Admin Dashboard is the nerve center of the apartment ecosystem, providing administrators with complete control over operations and ensuring system integrity. The dashboard focuses on operational efficiency, financial intelligence, and system transparency.

Core Features:
1. Asset Management: Comprehensive property management with detailed audit logs.
2. User Management: Real-time control over accounts, roles, and activation.
3. Financial Oversight: Receipt verification, booking approval, and PDF invoice tracking.
4. Monitoring & Analytics: Live dashboards for server status, system performance, and activity logs.
5. Security & Integrity: Continuous monitoring of encrypted data and database health.

Engineering Strengths:
- Enterprise-grade security architecture with field-level encryption.
- Optimized database performance using SQLite and SQLCipher.
- Parallel data loading strategy for fast response times.
- Advanced UI/UX with smooth animations and transitions.

legal.title: Legal AI Chat
legal.summary: An AI-powered legal assistant providing expert advice across multiple domains with full privacy.
legal.desc:
A pioneering legal platform facilitating access to information using the Gemma 4B language model, specifically fine-tuned for legal reasoning.

**⚖️ Legal Coverage:**
• **12+ Domains:** Specialized modules for Civil, Criminal, IP, Immigration, and Commercial law.
• **Smart Threading:** Auto-organized chats with contextual title generation using deterministic AI models.

**🧠 Neural Engineering:**
• **Adaptive GPU Loading:** Intelligent system detecting VRAM to calculate optimal layer distribution for local acceleration.
• **Logic Extraction:** Unique display of the 'Chain of Thought', parsing 'think' tags to show the AI's step-by-step reasoning.

**🔒 Privacy Fortress:**
• **Local Inference:** AI processing happens entirely on-device, ensuring sensitive consultations never touch the cloud.
• **Fernet Encryption:** Symmetric encryption for message storage and logic logs, ensuring full user data sovereignty.
legal.full_desc:
The Legal AI Consultation Platform is an advanced legal technology solution that combines cutting-edge AI with comprehensive legal knowledge to provide accessible guidance. This system features a Flutter-based mobile application connected to a FastAPI backend powered by the Gemma 4B language model.

Core Features:
1. Multi-Domain Legal Expertise: Covers 12 major legal categories including Civil, Criminal, and Commercial law.
2. AI-Powered Conversational Interface: Context-aware responses with encrypted conversation history.
3. Intelligent Management: Automatic title generation and user-specific conversation isolation.
4. Advanced Security: End-to-end message encryption (Fernet) and local inference for total privacy.
5. Chain-of-Thought Reasoning: Transparent AI decision-making by extracting logic from 'think' tags.
6. Multilingual Support: Arabic and English support with RTL layout capabilities.

Technical Highlights:
- Integration of Gemma 4B with an adaptive GPU offloading system.
- FastAPI backend with async request handling and secure DB sessions.
- RAG-style prompt engineering for high-quality legal information.
- Local inference ensures that sensitive queries never leave the system.

website.title: LegalAI Website
website.summary: Modern landing page for the Legal AI platform, showcasing features and pricing.
website.desc:
A modern landing page for the Legal AI platform showcasing features and pricing.

**⚖️ Legal Coverage:**
• **12+ Domains:** Specialized modules for Civil, Criminal, IP, Immigration, and Commercial law.
• **Smart Threading:** Auto-organized chats with contextual title generation using deterministic AI models.

**🧠 Neural Engineering:**
• **Adaptive GPU Loading:** Intelligent system detecting VRAM to calculate optimal layer distribution for local acceleration.
• **Logic Extraction:** Unique display of the 'Chain of Thought', parsing 'think' tags to show the AI's step-by-step reasoning.

cardio.title: Cardiomegaly Detection
cardio.summary: Advanced web portal for AI-driven cardiomegaly detection and professional medical reporting.
cardio.desc:
A professional medical web ecosystem designed for scalable diagnostic workflows, providing a stunning bridge between AI models and clinical practitioners.

**🏥 Specialized Portals:**
• **Doctor Portal:** High-impact interface for report creation, priority categorization (Urgent/Warning/Normal), and patient analytics.
• **User Environment:** Streamlined multi-file upload gateway with real-time UI status and result history tracking.
• **Engineering Dashboard:** Comprehensive system monitoring including resource usage, AI model latency, and database health.

**🎨 Aesthetic Engineering:**
• **Glassmorphism UI:** Modern, immersive design utilizing Tailwind CSS, hardware-accelerated animations, and backdrop filters.
• **Multilingual RTL:** Expertly crafted Arabic/English support with Cairo typography and culturally adapted responsive layouts.

**🔬 Diagnostic Pipeline:**
• **Live Counters:** Animated statistics processing hundreds of images with real-time confidence interval visualization.
• **Export Intelligence:** Automated medical report generation with data-driven recommendations and printable history logs.
cardio.full_desc:
The Cardio AI Web Platform is a comprehensive, modern web application providing a stunning, responsive interface for AI-powered medical image analysis. It features multiple role-based dashboards (User, Doctor, Engineer), real-time analytics, and an AI chatbot.

Core Features:
1. Multi-Role Authentication: Portals for Patients, Doctors, and Engineers with role-specific features.
2. Professional Dashboards: Medical report management, data analytics, and full system monitoring.
3. AI Image Analysis: Upload interface for medical images with confidence-coded results.
4. AI Chatbot: Virtual assistant providing information about cardiomegaly and health guidance.
5. Modern Design: Glassmorphism-based UI, smooth animations, and full dark/light mode support.
6. Bilingual Support: Full Arabic (RTL) and English support with culturally adapted content.

Technical Highlights:
- Tailwind CSS for advanced visual effects and responsive design.
- Real-time API integration for image processing and live statistics.
- Comprehensive monitoring system for resource usage, model status, and DB health.

cardio_app.title: Cardio Mobile App
cardio_app.summary: Mobile AI solution for rapid chest X-ray analysis and localized healthcare guidance.
cardio_app.desc:
Mobile medical AI at the edge, providing rapid cardiomegaly detection and health guidance through a sophisticated local intelligence pipeline.

**🩺 Diagnostic Power:**
• **Dual-Path Analysis:** Seamlessly switches between local TFLite offline inference and high-performance Cloud API modes.
• **AI Chat Integration:** A context-aware health assistant providing guidance on diagnostic results and medical terminology.

**🖼️ Medical Engineering:**
• **Deep Learning Engine:** Utilizes DenseNet-121 with specialized preprocessing (channel normalization & 224x224 resizing).
• **Offline-First Storage:** Local SQLite database with version migration support and indexing for instantaneous history retrieval.

**🏥 Clinical Features:**
• **Priority Dashboard:** Visual categorization of results based on diagnostic confidence and urgency levels.
• **Notification System:** Background monitoring for report availability and automated health alerts.
cardio_app.full_desc:
Cardio AI Mobile is a sophisticated healthcare application built with Flutter that leverages deep learning models to detect cardiomegaly from X-ray images. It combines cutting-edge AI with an intuitive mobile interface for rapid, accurate diagnostic support.

Core Features:
1. Dual-Mode Analysis: Supports local on-device inference (TFLite) and high-performance cloud API analysis.
2. Intelligent Image Processing: Sophisticated preprocessing pipeline for optimal model input.
3. AI Chat Assistant: Context-aware medical guidance in both Arabic and English.
4. Comprehensive Medical Reports: Priority-based system with doctor recommendations and history tracking.
5. Local Database (SQLite): Offline storage, analysis tracking, and data synchronization.
6. Full Localization: Arabic and English support with RTL layout and dynamic switching.

Technical Highlights:
- GetX state management for a reactive and efficient user interface.
- TensorFlow Lite integration for offline on-device deep learning.
- Comprehensive API architecture with robust error handling and JWT authentication.
- Performance optimizations for image processing and database queries.
